  <xml_string><ITEM>20. <BIBL><TITLE>Falckeisische Bibel</TITLE> noch gantz neu in <FORMAT>Schweins-leder</FORMAT> gebunden, √† <PRIZE>12. Gulden</PRIZE></BIBL>, oder gegen einem neuen <BIBL><TITLE>Corpore Juris</TITLE>, <PLACE>Leipziger Edition</PLACE></BIBL>, zu vertauschen.</ITEM></xml_string>

parsed.explanation: First, the inner XML string was escaped using entities (e.g., < and >) because placing raw XML tags inside another XML element's text content is syntactically invalid and would cause a parsing error.
